title: Health and body
explanation:
Health and the body

  • head, arm, leg, back, stomach
  • headache, cold, fever, pain
  • doctor, pharmacy, medicine
  • Verbs: feel, hurt, rest, exercise

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I have a ____. My head hurts. | *headache | stomach | arm
She has a sore ____. She can't speak well. | *throat | leg | back
You use your ____ to listen. | *ears | nose | knee
He broke his ____ playing football. | *leg | head | medicine

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option to complete these sentences. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: Take this ____ twice a day. | medicine
I bought it at the ____. | pharmacy
You need to ____ and drink water. | rest

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I don't ____ well today. | *feel | hurt | medicine
My back ____. I need to sit down. | *hurts | rests | exercises
Regular ____ is good for your health. | *exercise | fever | pharmacy
He went to ____ after the accident. | *hospital | headache | throat
